articles.title: Inside Mohanlal’s green haven: How actor turned passion for organic farming into a success
articles.description: From delivering Rs 200-crore blockbusters to cultivating his own vegetables, Malayalam icon Mohanlal leads by example. Here is a look inside his inspiring organic farming journey.

articles.title: Madhya Pradesh govt to give farmers helmets; will save lives in road accidents, says CM Yadav
articles.description: Madhya Pradesh News: CM Mohan Yadav announces the MP government will give helmets to farmers riding motorcycles to sell produce, aiming to prevent road accidents.

articles.title: China This Week | EU’s ‘Chemotherapy’ for battling trade surplus, changes in household system, and new nuclear test site photos
articles.description: Every week, we recap highlights of the news from China. This edition looks at the EU’s response to growing trade friction, the “hukou” system and reports of construction activities at the Lop Nur nuclear testing site.

articles.title: IPL 2026 Final: RCB win toss, opt to field against GT in summit clash
articles.description: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) won the toss and chose to field against Gujarat Titans (GT) in the IPL 2026 final at the Narendra Modi Stadium. RCB captain Rajat Patidar expressed confidence, opting to bowl first.

articles.title: Joint op along Guwahati rly tracks; 26 held, heroin, cannabis seized
articles.description: Joint op along Guwahati rly tracks; 26 held, heroin, cannabis seized

articles.title: Met police takes over probe after man found dead inside Leicester van, woman arrested in London
articles.description: Met police takes over probe after man found dead inside Leicester van, woman arrested in London

articles.title: Special Intensive Revision of Electoral Rolls Begins in Four States
articles.description: The Enumeration Phase of the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls has begun in Odisha, Mizoram, Sikkim, and Manipur. The ECI has set a deadline of June 28 for electors to submit forms for inclusion in the draft electoral rolls.

articles.title: Shimla sees massive tourist influx amid pleasant weather, cool breezes
articles.description: A massive tourist influx is hitting Shimla as pleasant weather and pre-monsoon showers offer a refuge from summer heat. Visitors from states like Gujarat are flocking to the Himachal capital for the cool climate and scenic views.

articles.title: PM Modi is the only world PM who talks to citizens monthly: Malhotra
articles.description: BJP's Harsh Malhotra lauded PM Modi after the 134th 'Mann ki Baat', calling him the only world PM to address citizens monthly. In the broadcast, Modi praised athletes like Gurindervir Singh for setting new records at the National Athletics Cup.

articles.title: Deendayal Port wins award; India launches new port performance index
articles.description: Deendayal Port Authority won the Sagar Aankalan Award for best performance in FY 2024-25. Union Minister Sarbananda Sonowal launched the Logistics Port Performance Index (LPPI) and other digital initiatives to modernize the maritime sector.

articles.title: Netflix's Desi Bling: Netizens Call Karan-Tejasswi Cringe, Question Satish Sanpal-Tabinda's Marriage
articles.description: Netflix's Desi Bling has emerged as the show viewers love to hate but cannot stop watching. Karan Kundrra's surprise proposal to Tejasswi Prakash to the extravagant lifestyle of self-proclaimed billionaire Satish Sanpal and his wife Tabinda, several moments from the show have got people talking. Despite mixed reviews, the reality show has kept audiences hooked. Watch for more.#desibling #karankundraa #tejasswiprakash #netflix

articles.title: Why Are Young Men Facing Erectile Dysfunction More Than Ever Before?
articles.description: Dr. Saransh Jain explains why erectile dysfunction is no longer just a problem of older men and what young men can do to protect their sexual health.

articles.title: Moments that shape a child’s identity: 5 reasons why family stories and rituals matter for children more than we think
articles.description: Family stories and rituals are vital for building identity, offering children a strong sense of belonging and helping them understand their roots. These traditions naturally teach values, build emotional resilience by showcasing how past generations overcame challenges, and create cherished memories that last a lifetime, connecting generations.

articles.title: RCB going in as favourites, says Ashwin ahead of IPL 2026 final
Krishna Shroff Calls Tiger Shroff 'A Little Psychotic': 'He'll Smell A Cake, But Won't Take A Bite'
articles.description: Krishna Shroff revealed Tiger is so disciplined that he only smells his birthday cake instead of eating it, jokingly calling her brother “a little psychotic.”

articles.title: 'Celebrating Me And Lil One': Mom-To-Be Surbhi Jyoti Shares Inside Photos Of Her Birthday Celebration
articles.description: Opening up about her pregnancy, Surbhi shared that she is currently in a happy and calm phase

articles.title: NATO claims new drone incident but officials find no proof: Putin catches west's lie about 'attack'?
articles.description: NATO is on edge after a fresh drone scare forced Germany to briefly shut down Munich Airport, its second‐busiest hub, just one day after a Russian‐made drone slammed into a residential building in Romania. The incident reignited fears about airspace security and the spillover of the Ukraine war deep into alliance territory. Is this the new normal for Europe’s skies — and how close is the alliance to a serious miscalculation?

articles.title: Spain out of the shadows and dreaming big again, with Lamine Yamal at the heart of it
articles.description: Lamine Yamal has shown his quality repeatedly at Barcelona, but Spain cannot rely solely on moments of individual brilliance.

articles.title: Kerala imposes 52-day trawling ban from June 9 to protect marine resources
articles.description: Kerala will enforce a 52-day trawling ban from June 9 to July 31 to protect fish stocks during the monsoon breeding season.

articles.title: Did Xi Jinping betray Trump? US rival accused of helping Iran shoot down America's $90 million F-15
articles.description: Fresh reports are raising new questions over China’s alleged role in Iran’s military buildup after claims emerged that Chinese systems may have helped track and target a U.S. F-15 during the Iran conflict. The revelations come as U.S.-China tensions flare over Taiwan, with sharp exchanges between Washington and Beijing adding another layer to an already volatile geopolitical standoff.

articles.title: AISA Calls June 1 Protest at Education Ministry, Demands Dharmendra Pradhan's Resignation
articles.description: The All India Students Association (AISA) has called a protest outside the Education Ministry on June 1, demanding accountability over NEET, CBSE and CUET-related issues.

articles.title: Ranveer Singh Reacts To Arsenal’s Champions League Loss, Says ‘Proud Of The Boys’
articles.description: Ranveer Singh Reacts To Arsenal’s Champions League Loss, Says ‘Proud Of The Boys’

articles.title: French Open 2026: Gold-sequinned Osaka survives three-setter, to face Sabalenka next
articles.description: Naomi Osaka's dazzling French Open campaign continues as her sparkling play propelled her into the fourth round for the first time. The four-time major champion secured a hard-fought victory against Iva Jovic, setting up a highly anticipated clash with world No. 1 Aryna Sabalenka. Osaka expressed a newfound calmness, embracing the journey.

articles.title: Just When Iran Deal Seemed Done, Trump Sends It Back for Revisions: Here's Why
articles.description: Trump's main concern relates to Iran's enriched uranium stockpile. The current draft does not contain detailed concessions beyond that pledge.

articles.description: Gadkari- Sunil Shetty inaugurated the sports event

articles.title: West Asia crisis: Govt waives import duty on cotton till October 30
articles.description: This is the second time in the last 12 months that the duty has been removed.

articles.description: Horrifying view of the lake due to rain in Nainital

articles.title: UP Police Constable admit card 2026 likely to be released tomorrow at upprpb.in: Check steps to download hall ticket
articles.description: UP Police Constable admit cards for 2026 are anticipated tomorrow, June 1, on upprpb.in. The offline OMR-based exam is scheduled for June 8-10 across Uttar Pradesh. Candidates can expect city intimation details beforehand. Ensure you carry the admit card and valid ID to the exam centre. Stay tuned to the official website for updates.

articles.title: India poised to benefit as global wealth turns to AI, infra, emerging markets: Report
articles.description: Global family offices are increasingly directing capital toward artificial intelligence, infrastructure, energy transition and emerging markets as they reposition portfolios for a more uncertain world. A new UBS report suggests these trends could create significant opportunities for India across technology, infrastructure, private markets and gold investments.

articles.title: Suniel Shetty said sports are important for children
articles.description: Suniel Shetty said sports are important for children

articles.title: Our naval might confined Pakistan to its ports: Rajnath Singh
articles.description: The Defence Minister said, “It is not just an architectural design or a product of structural craftsmanship, it rekindles a sense of gratitude we hold for our soldiers. The idea is to awaken the zeal for nation building among our youth.”

articles.title: Karnal: Haryana govt working to promote ayurveda in world, says AYUSH DG
articles.description: There are nearly 1,500 manufacturers of ayurveda products in Haryana, most of whom joined the training programme conducted by master trainer Dr Muhammed Khalid, licensing authority, Unani, Delhi

articles.title: How a Gurgaon couple spent ₹1.59 lakh in March and still invested ₹2.2 lakh
articles.description: Gagan Saini shared an Instagram video last week where he explained how he and his wife managed to jointly spend ₹1.59 lakh in the month of March.

articles.title: Bhimashankar temple to reopen for devotees from June 10
articles.description: The historic Bhimashankar Temple in Pune district will reopen for devotees from June 10, acting district collector Gajanan Patil announced on Saturday

articles.title: Strictly monitor & report demographic changes in border districts: Amit Shah to DMs
articles.description: Home Minister asks officials to deport ‘infiltrators’

articles.title: In travels of Buddha’s sacred relics, India’s soft power outreach
articles.description: Buddha’s sacred relics were displayed in Ladakh in 1950 to boost the morale after the Iindo-Pak war of 1947-48

articles.title: Russia vs Ukraine Over Drone Strike on Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Plant
articles.description: A drone struck a building at the Russian-occupied Zaporizhzhia nuclear power plant in southeastern Ukraine on Saturday, causing damage but leaving core equipment intact. Ukraine denied responsibility for the attack.

articles.title: Choose your FD scheme: Fixed deposits vs Post Office deposits -- which offers better returns in June 2026?
articles.description: Fixed deposits and post office savings schemes remain two of India's most popular low-risk investment options, offering predictable returns and capital protection. While bank FDs score on flexibility and liquidity, post office schemes often provide higher sovereign-backed returns, especially for long-term investors and senior citizens.

articles.title: UP BEd Exam 2026 Begins Today; Check Shift Timings And Admit Card Details
articles.description: The UP BEd Exam 2026 starts on May 31 with two shifts scheduled from 9 AM to 12 noon and 2 PM to 5 PM.

articles.title: Indo-Tibet trade to resume via Shipki La from June 1: Negi
articles.description: Speaking to mediapersons on Saturday, Negi termed the reopening of the Shipki La trade route in Kinnaur as a significant step in reviving traditional Indo-Tibetan trade links

articles.title: Demand for Mhada flats falls 50% in two years
articles.description: For the 2,640 Mhada flats on offer across the city this year, the housing authority received 75,366 applications accompanied by deposit money, and the average number of applications per flat stood at 28.54

articles.title: HC seeks Punjab’s response on vacancies in education tribunal
articles.description: HC has directed the Punjab government to inform it about the steps taken to fill the vacant and soon-to-be-vacant posts before the next hearing scheduled on July 8

articles.title: Delhi building collapse: 9 rescued in Mehrauli, 6 feared trapped
articles.description: A fire was reported at a factory in Delhi's Mahipalpur. In a separate incident, a five-storey building collapsed in Mehrauli, where nine people have been rescued. A joint operation is underway as six others are feared trapped.

articles.title: England vs India, 2nd T20I: Freya Kemp's all-round show levels series
articles.description: Freya Kemp's all-round brilliance (39* & 2/15) guided England to a 26-run victory over India in the second T20I, leveling the series 1-1. Despite a good start, India's middle-order collapsed in the chase of 169, falling 26 runs short.

articles.title: 3rd time in 3 yrs: GR on inclusion of logo on school uniforms stirs row
articles.description: With barely two weeks left for schools to reopen after the summer break with the new academic year on June 15, school management committees and teachers said the directive had come too late and there wasn’t enough time for implementatio

articles.title: Malaysia’s LGBTQ groups tread more carefully amid recent enforcement, ministers’ rhetoric
articles.description: Recent moves by the Malaysian authorities point to a more restrictive climate for LGBTQ people in the country, analysts say, and this could be due to political competition as well as the visibility of some events.

articles.title: Not just checking a box: How Buddhist teachings inspire these two men to give blood regularly
articles.description: For two Buddhists, donating blood is a way to live out the values of kindness, compassion and generosity.

articles.title: Commentary: Methanol, pistachios and cement - other Iranian exports choked by the war
articles.description: Given disruptions in supply chains all over the world, the conflict has shown that Iran’s role in the global economy is not merely centred on oil, says this writer.

articles.title: Missing saroops probe: Akal Takht advises SGPC against sharing ‘irrelevant’ info with SIT
articles.description: According to people familiar with the matter, Akal Takht acting jathedar Giani Kuldeep Singh Gargaj, in his response, stated that the SGPC is an autonomous body and no state agency has the authority to seek records or information unrelated to the matter under investigation

articles.title: Invisible walls: Caste in early learning spaces
articles.description: An opinion piece examines how caste bias shapes children's experiences in Anganwadis and preschools, from separate utensils to social exclusion. It highlights child rights, equality, nutrition, dignity and inclusive learning.
